CaiShenWinsPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_15_Payout6_4: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
CaiShenWinsPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_16_Payout6_5: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
CaiShenWinsPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_18_Payout1_1: Some symbols (excluding Wild symbol) in reels 2, 3, 4 and/or 5 may occupy 2 to 4 symbols' spaces and each of these symbols will represent as a single symbol during payout calculations.
CaiShenWinsPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_20_Payout1_3: Wild symbol appears on reels 2, 3, 4 and 5 only.
CaiShenWinsPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_1_Payout2_1: During any spins, some symbols (excluding Wild symbol) in reels 2, 3, 4 and/or 5 that occupy 2 to 4 symbols' spaces may have a silver frame around itself.
CaiShenWinsPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_2_Payout2_2: At every new round after the new symbols have cascaded down, any silver-framed symbol(s) that is involved in a win in the previous round will be transformed into a randomly selected symbol (other than Wild symbol) with a gold frame around itself.
CaiShenWinsPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_3_Payout2_3: At every new round after the new symbols have cascaded down, any gold-framed symbol(s) that is involved in a win in the previous round will be transformed into 2 to 4 Wild symbols depending on the number of symbol spaces occupied by that gold-framed symbol.
CaiShenWinsPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_1_Payout3_1: During any spins, a Success Caishen symbol block (4 symbols wide) may appear on the additional top reel.
CaiShenWinsPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_2_Payout3_2: If the Success Caishen symbol block fully appears in the additional top reel, it will transform itself into 4 Wild symbols.
CaiShenWinsPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_2_Payout4_2: Players may choose to start the Free Spins Feature with 8 free spins (with an additional 2 free spins for each extra Scatter symbol that triggered the Feature) and x8 for all wins, or to gamble for more free spins and/or higher multiplier.
CaiShenWinsPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_4_Payout4_3: If the gamble for more free spins is successful, 2 more free spins will be added. Otherwise the Free Spins Feature will end.
CaiShenWinsPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_6_Payout4_4: If the gamble for a higher multiplier is successful, the multiplier value will be increased by 2. Otherwise the Free Spins Feature will end.
CaiShenWinsPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_9_Payout4_5: 4 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere during the Free Spins Feature will award 8 more free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will award 2 more free spins.

CaiShenWinsRule.Rule1_1: CaiShen Wins is a 6-reel, 5-row video slot (with an additional reel on top of reel 2, 3, 4 and 5) featuring Wilds-on-the-Way and free spins with gamble feature.
CaiShenWinsRule.Rule1_2: The game is played with 20 base bet for %{2025} ways - %{32400} ways, bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
CaiShenWinsRule.Rule1_22: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
CaiShenWinsRule.Rule4_3: Tap on the top wheel to gamble for more free spins. Tap on the bottom wheel to gamble for a higher multiplier.
CaiShenWinsRule.Rule4_5: The maximum number of free spins that can be won are 20. The gamble for free spins will be disabled if 20 free spins are won before or during the gamble.
CaiShenWinsRule.Rule4_7: The gamble for a higher multiplier will be disabled if the multiplier value reaches x20 during the gamble.
CaiShenWinsRule.Rule4_8: Tap on the 'Collect' button to start the Free Spins Feature with the indicated number of free spins. All wins will be multiplied by the indicated multiplier.
CaiShenWinsRule.Rule4_10: If the pointer of the wheel points at the green area after spinning, the gamble is successful.
CaiShenWinsRule.Rule8_2: The procedures used to manage unfinished game rounds.
CaiShenWinsRule.Rule8_3: The time after which inactive game sessions automatically end.
